channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marriott Homes & Villas Offers 10% Discount on 2+ Night Stays with Stackable Promotions
item.description: Marriott's Homes & Villas platform is offering a promotion that gives travelers a 10% discount when booking stays of two or more consecutive nights. This offer is valid for bookings made from February...

item.title: Comprehensive Review of the Best Current Credit Card Offers
item.description: This article from Frequent Miler provides an in-depth overview of the top current credit card offers available as of February 2026. It covers both consumer and business credit cards, highlighting the ...

item.title: Comprehensive Review of the American Express Blue Business Plus Credit Card

item.title: Unitree Spring Festival Gala Robots —a Full Release of Additional Details
item.description: The video showcases a detailed look at the robots participating in Unitree's Spring Festival gala. It appears to be a demonstration and explanation of their performance, highlighting technical aspects...

item.title: Capital One Cardholders Can Earn 16x Miles or 16% Cashback on In-Store Belk Purchases
item.description: Capital One currently offers a special promotion for targeted cardholders to earn 16x miles or 16% cashback on in-store purchases at Belk. Each linked Capital One card can activate the offer up to thr...

item.title: JetBlue Offers Double Mosaic Tiles on $100+ One-Way Flights for Limited Time
item.description: JetBlue is offering a limited-time promotion allowing travelers to earn double Tiles toward Mosaic elite status for qualifying one-way flights costing $100 or more. This promotion is valid for booking...

item.title: Jada Pinkett Smith Files Motion to Dismiss Bilaal Salaam’s $3 Million Lawsuit Alleging Threats
item.description: Jada Pinkett Smith has moved to dismiss a $3 million lawsuit filed against her by musician Bilaal Salaam, rejecting his allegations as false and unsubstantiated. According to court documents cited in ...

item.title: EU Implements Rules to Prevent Destruction of Unsold Apparel and Footwear
item.description: The European Commission has introduced new measures under the Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (ESPR) aimed at preventing the destruction of unsold clothing, footwear, and accessories. Ea...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Jokes About Affair Rumors Involving Corey Lewandowski and Kristi Noem

item.title: Haier’s Ownership Model and the Diversity of Corporate Structures in China

item.description: JetBlue is running a promotional offer for travelers booking Flight + Cruise packages through TrueBlue Vacations. The promotion includes a Buy One, Get One Free (BOGO) deal on base airfare for two pas...

item.title: Swiss Olympic commentator criticises Israeli athlete’s past Gaza war comments during Winter Games broadcast

item.title: Songwriters Hall of Fame Inductee Billy Steinberg Dies at 74 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Billy Steinberg, the acclaimed American songwriter whose lyrics helped define pop music in the 1980s and 1990s, has died at the age of 74. According to his attorney, Laurie Soriano, Steinberg passed a...

item.title: The Role of the UK in Supporting the 1954 US-Backed Coup in Guatemala
item.description: Declassified documents reveal that in 1954, the United Kingdom played a key role in concealing the United States’ involvement in the overthrow of Guatemala’s democratically-elected government. Followi...

item.title: How Dashboard Cameras Provide Safety, Evidence, and Convenience for Families
item.description: The article explores the growing reasons families are installing dashboard cameras in their vehicles for everyday use. It explains that modern driving often involves unpredictable situations, from sud...

item.title: Hideki Sato, Key Engineer Behind Sega Consoles, Dies at 77
item.description: Hideki Sato, widely recognized as the 'Father of Sega Hardware,' passed away on February 13, 2026, at the age of 77. Joining Sega in 1971, Sato witnessed the company’s transformation from a U.S.-based...

item.title: Oscar-Winning Actor Robert Duvall Dies at 95 After Celebrated Six-Decade Career
item.description: Robert Duvall, the acclaimed and versatile American actor known for his powerful, understated performances across film and television, has died at the age of 95. His wife, Luciana, announced that he p...
